params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 black Assassin creature token with menace. When you do, return target Equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield, then attach it to that token.

params.Description: As long as CARDNAME hasn't dealt damage yet, it has hexproof and can't be blocked.
As long as CARDNAME hasn't dealt damage yet, it has hexproof and can't be blocked.
